premieresThisWeek.title: 这一秒过火
premieresThisWeek.summary: 民国乱世，备受冷眼的世家少爷慕容清峄与饱受苦难的复仇孤女任素素阴差阳错结缘相识，却因误会含恨而别。两人再重逢，却身份错位，陷入爱恨交织的极限拉扯中。二人历经世事波折与生离死别，最后携手直面乱世危局。
premieresThisWeek.summaryEn: In Republican Shanghai, Murong Qingyi, a warlord’s son swapped at birth, endures years of torment. His life changes when Ren Susu saves him, but tragedy strikes her family because of it. Years later,

premieresThisWeek.title: GIGN：精英部队
premieresThisWeek.summary: 所属精英部队遭遇空前袭击，即将从第一线退下的高级军官率队展开危险任务，也因而被迫面对自己的过去。
premieresThisWeek.summaryEn: After an unprecedented attack on his unit, a high-ranking officer set to leave the field leads a perilous mission that forces him to confront his past.

premieresThisWeek.title: 鬼谜东宫
premieresThisWeek.summary: 一名游走于灵界的男子，与一位能听见亡者之声的宫女奉皇命进入东宫 — 他们能揭开其中的黑暗秘密吗？
premieresThisWeek.summaryEn: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

premieresThisWeek.title: 寻迹庞贝古城：与汤姆·希德勒斯顿同行
premieresThisWeek.titleEn: Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston
premieresThisWeek.summary: 火山吞噬庞贝的那天，是否有人躲过死神降临？跟着汤姆·希德勒斯顿重返灾难前的最后一天。结合尖端考古学与历史推演，层层揭开尘封千年的真相。见证人们在分秒必争之际，如何做出攸关生死的关键抉择。
premieresThisWeek.summaryEn: A historical exploration about the eruption of Vesuvius in 79 A.D. and the preserved Roman city it left behind.

upcoming.title: 校园暗恋警报
upcoming.summary: 摇滚少年Leeith被迫考入刚招收男生的前女子名校，悠闲生活瞬间变成全校焦点的生存大战。为应对文化冲击，他创办了男生互助社，吸引了毒舌电竞少年Putter等一众伙伴。Leeith与成为室友的死敌Putter从针锋相对到看见彼此的脆弱，甚至打破了“绝不吃窝边草”的原则坠入爱河。然而，Putter过去的白月光秘密曝光，让刚萌芽的感情陷入巨大危机。这是一个关于那些边缘人在混乱中抱团取暖、面对情感危机并最
upcoming.summaryEn: After transferring to a top high school, aspiring rock star Leerit vows to avoid romance — but quickly changes his tune when he meets his new roommate.

upcoming.title: 柯蒂斯总统
upcoming.summary: 柯蒂斯总统及其古怪的幕僚团队将共同应对那些瑞克根本不会理会的一系列危机——从跨维度外交到超自然现象调查，再到无法解释的异常事件。
upcoming.summaryEn: Follow the Commander-in-Chief and his eccentric staff as they tackle the kind of crises that Rick Sanchez could never be bothered with - from interdimensional diplomacy to paranormal investigations an

upcoming.title: 我的荒糖恋爱
upcoming.summary: 一名事业心十足的检察官失忆后，搬去和声称是自己男友的拳击教练同住。这段尴尬同居会发展成真爱吗？
upcoming.summaryEn: An ambitious prosecutor loses her memory and moves in with a boxing coach who claims to be her boyfriend. Can this sticky situation turn into real love?

upcoming.title: 爱情决胜点
upcoming.summary: 两位网球选手因父母间的世仇，多年来一直视彼此为宿敌。然而，在一次比赛中，他们被迫搭档组成双打组合。在并肩作战的过程中，两人内心深处隐藏的情感开始悄然浮出水面。
upcoming.summaryEn: When rival shop owners' sons Sun and Be are forced to play tennis doubles, hiding their secret team gets harder as real romance begins to bloom.

ongoing.title: 权力的游戏前传：龙族
ongoing.summary: 在维斯特洛大陆，坦格利安家族的衰落被公之于众。一场被称为“血龙狂舞”的内战即将爆发。
ongoing.summaryEn: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins wh

ongoing.title: 幸运女神
ongoing.summary: 一宗涉及数百万美元的劫案搞砸后，骗徒幸儿被迫亡命天涯。在联邦调查局与冷血黑帮大佬的夹击下，幸儿必须为生存而战，设法逃出生天。
ongoing.summaryEn: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

ongoing.title: 瑞克和莫蒂
ongoing.summary: 一名反社会人格的天才科学家拉着他天性胆怯的孙子一同进行疯狂又危险的跨宇宙探险的故事。瑞克·桑切斯和女儿贝丝一家同住，他经常带着她、女婿杰瑞、孙女桑美和孙子莫蒂一同踏上大胆的星系冒险之旅。
ongoing.summaryEn: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.

ongoing.title: 末日地堡
ongoing.summary: 该剧基于休·豪伊所著同名畅销科幻系列小说改编，在一个满目疮痍、有毒物质遍布的未来世界中，成千上万的人居住在深埋在地下的巨大筒仓里。在警长违反了一项基本规则以及有些居民神秘死亡后，工程师朱丽叶开始揭开惊人的秘密和筒仓的真相。
ongoing.summaryEn: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking sec

ongoing.title: 入戏
ongoing.summary: 需要机会告别事业困境的张准去试戏电影《入戏》，遇上了年少成名的影帝甄心。桀骜不逊还是没有边界？面对甄心的得寸进尺，张准摸不清楚甄心的脾气却只能忍耐，最终他通过试戏拿到了角色，与甄心在戏内开始了医生与病患的爱欲较量。可谁能想到甄心却在戏外强吻了他，从那一刻开始戏内戏外是谁已入戏……
ongoing.summaryEn: Filming a daring romance movie, an award-winning actor and an ambitious newcomer lose track of where acting ends and their real desire begins.

ongoing.title: 无职转生～到了异世界就拿出真本事～
ongoing.summary: “我要在这个异世界拿出真本事！”34岁童贞且无职的家里蹲男子，在父母的葬礼当天被赶出家门后，在路上被一辆卡车所撞死。意识清醒后，他发现自己居然作为一个刚出生的婴儿转生到了剑与魔法的异世界！像废物一样活过了前世的男子，发誓要作为少年·鲁迪乌斯在异世界以认真的态度好好活下去！等待着鲁迪乌斯的是，与娇小魔术师、有着精灵长耳又很男孩子气的美少女、凶暴的傲娇大小姐以及其他性格各异的人们之间的邂逅，当然也还有
ongoing.summaryEn: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted.

ongoing.title: 抢答
ongoing.summary: 美国最受欢迎的问答节目，参赛者会以常识线索的形式回答，并以问题形式表达答案。
ongoing.summaryEn: America's favorite quiz show where contestants are presented with general knowledge clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.

ongoing.title: 早晨神话
ongoing.summary: 两位“网络娱乐者”（Rhett 和 Link）不断尝试各种奇特的事情，每周一至周五为你带来每日份的轻松喜剧内容。
ongoing.summaryEn: Two "Internetainers" (Rhett & Link) go far out and do the weirdest things, giving you a daily dose of casual comedy every Monday-Friday.

ongoing.title: 比勒陀利亚医院
ongoing.summary: 一部南非阿非利卡语肥皂剧。该剧以虚构的比内兰德诊所为中心，该诊所位于比勒陀利亚及其周边地区，剧情围绕着医院员工及病人们的磨难、创伤和困扰展开。
ongoing.summaryEn: A South African Afrikaans soap opera. It is set in and around the fictional private hospital, Binneland Kliniek, in Pretoria, and the storyline follows the trials, trauma and tribulations of the staff

ongoing.title: 犯罪心理
ongoing.summary: 犯罪心理研究小组隶属FBI，他们跨州行动，主要针对连环杀人案，从嫌疑人的犯罪心理和行为模式入手建立人物侧写，圈定罪犯的性别、年龄、职业特征、居住环境乃至成长经历，从而预测罪犯下一步行为，直至缉拿罪犯。他们的成员包括：高智商、强记忆力的少年天才斯拜瑟尔·瑞德博士——负责数据和资料分析；外冷内热的硬汉阿伦·哈奇——沟通能力极强，波多黎各小伙德里克·摩根——强制性犯罪行为专家；打扮招摇的小胖妹佩妮洛普·
ongoing.summaryEn: An elite team of FBI profilers analyze the country's most twisted criminal minds, anticipating their next moves before they strike again. The Behavioral Analysis Unit's most experienced agent is David

ongoing.title: 安迪·科恩的现场观察
ongoing.titleEn: Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen
ongoing.summary: 布拉沃电视台的高管安迪·科恩与名人和真人秀明星一起畅聊流行文化议题。
ongoing.summaryEn: Bravo network executive Andy Cohen discusses pop culture topics with celebrities and reality show personalities.

ongoing.title: 每日秀
ongoing.summary: “世界上最假新闻团队”针砭时弊，探讨新闻、政治和流行文化领域中的重大事件。
ongoing.summaryEn: The World's Fakest News Team tackle the biggest stories in news, politics and pop culture.

ongoing.title: 金特务：本色回归
ongoing.summary: 改编自同名网络漫画，讲述的是原本只想平凡当个父亲的金部长，在挚爱的女儿突然失踪后，不得不揭开自己极力隐藏的真实身份，为了救回女儿不惜一切的故事。
ongoing.summaryEn: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

ongoing.title: 天空之主
ongoing.summary: 他那个时代最强大的毒贩，这就是阿马多·卡里洛·富恩特斯的生活和时代ñ或者是德洛斯奇洛斯（天空之主），一个成为Ju头目的人á雷兹卡特尔。故事发生在上世纪90年代，他因运送毒品的大型飞机机队而被昵称。他还以通过哥伦比亚为庞大的舰队提供2亿多美元的资金而闻名。
ongoing.summaryEn: Set in the 1990s, these are the life and times of Amado Carrillo Fuentes, a man who became the head of the Juárez cartel. Nicknamed “El Señor de los Cielos” (Lord of the Skies) because of the large fl

ongoing.title: 樱桃小丸子
ongoing.summary: 小丸子是一名小学二年级的女生，她活泼、好动、懒惰、什么事情都拖到最后一刻才做、学习不认真、成绩平平、经常和姐姐斗气、爱幻想、做事没恒心……在小丸子身上我们或多或少都看到了自己童年的影子。如果小丸子算是一个“怪人”的话，那么她的周围可谓“怪人”多多，有点神经质的班长丸尾同学、权利欲极强的女副班长、经常和小丸子一起疯的爷爷，讨人厌的宾治同学等等，这群性格各异、精力充沛的小孩、大人们，每天都在演绎着生活
ongoing.summaryEn: Meet Maruko, a sweet schoolgirl with a hefty dose of curiosity (and occasional laziness!). She sails through life in a cozy town alongside her loving parents, grandparents, and sister. Maruko has a ba

ongoing.title: 检察官的提案
ongoing.summary: 曾因“杀人犯之子”的标签饱受欺凌的李彩河，在洗清冤屈后成为一名八级检察院调查员。他被分配到檀岘分局，努力开启新生活，却意外与曾帮助过他的检察官朱泰善重逢。朱泰善性格完美主义且敏感古怪，在一次共同值夜班后，他对李彩河产生了浓厚兴趣。为了调查一桩悬而未决的谋杀案，朱泰善提议李彩河担任自己的专属调查员。两人在压抑又充满张力的办公环境下，展开了一场徘徊于职场正义与禁忌情感之间的危险博弈。
ongoing.summaryEn: A victim’s son and a killer’s son reunite as a prosecutor and investigator, fighting systemic corruption while becoming each other's salvation.

ongoing.title: 名侦探柯南
ongoing.summary: 高中生侦探工藤新一与毛利兰在游乐园游玩时发现两个行动诡异的黑衣男子，便跟踪他们，不料被灌下一种叫「APTX4869」的神秘毒药，然而因为药物副作用，新一的身体竟回到孩童状态。为不使周围的人受到牵连，他化名为「江户川柯南」，寄住在毛利兰家中，用阿笠博士发明的手表型麻醉枪让毛利小五郎睡着，接着用蝴蝶结变声器模仿他的声音来进行推理，解决了许多案件，并一直寻找着黑衣组织的人的下落，希望有朝一日将其绳之以法
ongoing.summaryEn: The son of a world famous mystery writer, Jimmy Kudo, has achieved his own notoriety by assisting the local police as a student detective. He has always been able to solve the most difficult of crimin

ongoing.title: 我独自生活
ongoing.summary: 《我独自生活》是由韩国MBC电视台新年播放的特辑《男人的独居时代》改名进行播出的，于2013年3月22日首播。
ongoing.summaryEn: It can be a badge of honor to be “single.” “I Live Alone” is a documentary-style South Korean reality series that follows the members of a self-formed club called Rainbow, which is comprised of  celeb

ongoing.title: 认识的哥哥
ongoing.summary: 本片是一个场景喜剧综艺节目。 在每集中，新的名人嘉宾将以转校生形式来到这所“哥哥学校”，七位调皮的哥哥同学则在这里恭候他们，大家一同参与节目中充满欢乐气氛的环节。
ongoing.summaryEn: Male celebs play make-believe as high schoolers, welcoming star transfer students every week and engaging in battles of witty humor and slapstick.

ongoing.title: 假面骑士
ongoing.summary: 《假面骑士》系列是由石森章太郎原作、东映株式会社制作的日本特摄系列英雄故事。
ongoing.summaryEn: Takeshi Hongo is a promising young man with a passion for motorcycle racing. However, his dreams are suddenly ruined when he gets kidnapped by Shocker, the evil secret organization planning to dominat
